# Data Model: astraAllStarLineForest


Results from the LineForest astra pipeline for each star


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example HDUS List](#example-hdus-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
Results from the LineForest astra pipeline for each star. 

### Naming Convention
$MWM_ASTRA/0.6.0/summary/astraAllStarLineForest-0.6.0.fits.gz

### Releases
DR19, DR20

### Enviroments
MWM_ASTRA

### Approximate Size
424 MB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
astra

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
0.0.0

### HDUS List for release DR20
  - [HDU0: PRIMARY](#hdu0-primary)
  - [HDU1](#hdu1)
  - [HDU2](#hdu2)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
 - DR20
   - from: DR19
   - primary_delta_nkeys: 8

---

### HDU0: PRIMARY
Metadata

#### HDU Size:  0 bytes

| EXTEND | True |  |
|  |  |  |
|  | Metadata |  |
|  |  |  |

|  |  |  |
|  | HDU Descriptions |  |
|  |  |  |

| COMMENT | HDU 4: APOGEE spectra taken at Las Campanas Observatory |  |
